parameters.name: Build per-directory tag dbs (SQLite)
parameters.description: Walk the repo; for every non-excluded directory write a local SQLite tag.db with tags, udt_types, sections, kinds, refs, ids, and full UDT bodies. Additionally writes a root tag.db with tag_dirs + tag_samples + graph_url_* + graph_fs_* + graph_indexes tables for whole-tree queries.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: tag.db counts, graph sizes, retired-legacy count
